title: Suwimut 3 Pack Stainless Steel Mixing Bowls, 5 Quart Flat Base Stainless Steel Serving Bowls, 33cm/13inch Mirror Polish Large Metal Bowl Set for Kitchen Cooking, Baking, Prepping
features: Large Capacity - Pack of 3 stainless steel serving bowls. Top diameter: 33cm/13"; bottom diameter: 15cm/5.9"; height: 11cm/4.5". This bowl provides a large capacity for mixing, serving, or storing.

Versatile Usage - This set of bowls will meet your different needs in the home kitchen, such as preparing food, mixing salads, storing leftovers, and cracking eggs or soups. Their classy, polished mirror finish and top quality make them a beautiful and practical gift idea for any cooking and baking enthusiast!

Premium Quality - This stainless steel mixing bowl is made of high quality stainless steel for long-lasting durability and resistance to rust. Attractive mirror finish and elegant appearance enhances the look and feel of your kitchen tools.

Easy to Clean - The smooth stainless steel surface of this mixing bowl is easy to clean by hand and is also dishwasher safe for your convenience. So when you complete your meal preparation plan or regular daily dinner, simply put it in the dishwasher to get a wash free experience.

Practical Design - These bowls feature a flat bottom, which gives the bowls stability while you mix your ingredients. The deep bowl design is ideal for mixing without any spatter. With a convenient, space-saving and stackable design, our dough mixing bowls can easily fit in any kitchen.
description: Product Description Suwimut 3 Pack Stainless Steel Mixing Bowls, 5 Quart Flat Base Stainless Steel Serving Bowls, 13 Inch Large Metal Bowls for Cooking, Baking, Prepping The mixing bowl set will equip your kitchen with 3 premium stainless steel bowls, you can use for meal prep, baking, cooking, storing, serving and so much more. Ideal for any application, from mixing doughs to prepper salad dressings, this bowl set has a size perfect for every dish. Large Capacity - Pack of 3 stainless steel serving bowls. Top diameter: 13"; bottom diameter: 5.9"; height: 4.5". This bowl provides a large capacity for mixing, serving, or storing. Useful for all mixing and food prep in large quantities. Practical Design - These bowls feature a flat bottom, which gives the bowls stability while you mix your ingredients. The deep bowl design is ideal for mixing without any spatter. With a convenient, space-saving and stackable design, our dough mixing bowls can easily fit in any kitchen. Versatile Usage - This set of bowls will meet your different needs in the home kitchen, such as preparing food, mixing salads, storing leftovers, and cracking eggs or soups. Their classy, polished mirror finish and top quality make them a beautiful and practical gift idea for any cooking and baking enthusiast!
